name: Spark Mail
description: Smart email client with AI-powered inbox, snooze, send later, team collaboration, and unified inbox across accounts

version_check.url: Sparkle SUFeedURL is embedded in the app bundle — exact URL not publicly documented

extraction.pattern: sparkle:shortVersionString (if appcast URL discovered from app bundle)

version_check.fallback: Check Mac App Store listing (id:1176895641), Setapp version, or scrape https://sparkmailapp.com/download for version metadata

release_date.field: pubDate in Sparkle appcast (if reachable) or scrape from https://sparkmailapp.com/blog

notes: Sparkle SUFeedURL is only visible inside the app bundle's Info.plist or from Sparkle framework internals — not publicly documented. Also distributed via Mac App Store and Setapp. The website download page may serve the Setapp-managed or standalone version. Developed by Readdle (now Spark Mail Inc.). iOS, Android, and Windows versions also available.
